headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录270篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究190篇, 开源项目45篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API5篇。热门标签：Agent（70篇）。其中11%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ Shubhamsaboo /awesome-llm-apps：100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

▸ mattpocock /skills：Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

▸ Dicklesworthstone /destructive_command_guard：The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being exec

▸ virattt /ai-hedge-fund：An AI Hedge Fund Team

▸ Nutlope /hallmark：Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
text: 今日共收录270篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究190篇, 开源项目45篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API5篇。热门标签：Agent（70篇）。其中11%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
